overview: GrowthOS is a premium AI-powered SaaS platform for digital marketing agencies and local businesses. It automates lead generation, client acquisition, messaging, SEO, analytics, and business growth — helping agencies scale with minimal manual effort. Features include live Stripe payments, WhatsApp integration, competitor intelligence, content calendar, case study builder, affiliate commissions, statistical A/B testing, and an investor-ready metrics dashboard.
features: Live Stripe checkout for real plan upgrades
In-app notification center with real-time alerts
Case study builder with shareable proof cards
Affiliate commission dashboard with payout tracking
Competitor intelligence deep-dive with ad and keyword analysis
Bulk SEO page generator for niche+city landing pages
A/B test statistical significance with z-test and confidence scoring
In-app guided onboarding tour for new users
Investor report PDF export from SaaS Metrics dashboard
Real Google PageSpeed API integration for website scanner
Live competitor website scans via HTTP outcalls
